# Gold Country Appliance Repair
## gcappliancerepair.com

> Gold Country Appliance Repair is a licensed, insured mobile appliance repair service serving Nevada County, Placer County, and Sacramento County in Northern California. Owner and lead technician Paul Capone comes directly to your home — no shop drop-off required. Licensed by the California Bureau of Household Goods and Services (BHGS). Phone: (530) 277-3536.

## About

Gold Country Appliance Repair is a family-owned and operated mobile appliance repair business based in the Grass Valley, CA area. Owner Paul Capone grew up with an electronic engineer father and brings deep technical expertise to every repair. The business serves communities throughout the Sierra Nevada foothills and the I-80 corridor from Alta to Roseville.

- Owner: Paul Capone
- License: Bureau of Household Goods and Services (BHGS), California
- EPA 608 Universal Certification
- Phone: (530) 277-3536
- Website: https://gcappliancerepair.com
- Booking: https://gcappliancerepair.com/booking/
- Service guarantee: 30-day parts and labor warranty on all repairs

## Services

- Refrigerator repair (all brands including Sub-Zero)
- Freezer repair (chest, upright, built-in)
- Washing machine repair (front-load and top-load)
- Dryer repair (gas, electric, and LP propane)
- Dishwasher repair (all major brands including Miele and Bosch)
- Oven, stove, and range repair (gas, electric, LP propane)
- LP propane appliance conversions (dryers, stoves, ovens, ranges)

## Brands Serviced

Standard: Whirlpool, LG, Samsung, GE, KitchenAid, Maytag, Frigidaire, Electrolux, Amana, Speed Queen

Premium: Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Thermador, Viking, Bosch

## Service Areas

### Nevada County
Grass Valley, Nevada City, Penn Valley, Rough and Ready, Smartsville, North San Juan, Cascade Shores, Alta Sierra, Peardale, You Bet, Cedar Ridge, Chicago Park, Lake of the Pines, Lake Wildwood

### Placer County
Auburn, Roseville, Rocklin, Lincoln, Loomis, Colfax, Alta, Gold Run, Dutch Flat, Weimar, Applegate, Meadow Vista, Newcastle, Granite Bay, Penryn

### Sacramento County
Folsom

## Gated & Senior Communities Served

Gold Country Appliance Repair regularly services gated communities, 55+ active adult communities, and assisted living facilities including:

- Sun City Lincoln Hills (Lincoln, CA) — largest active adult community in California
- Sun City Roseville (Roseville, CA)
- Springfield at Whitney Oaks (Rocklin, CA)
- Whitney Oaks (Rocklin, CA)
- Morgan Creek (Roseville, CA)
- Stanford Ranch (Rocklin, CA)
- Lake Wildwood (Penn Valley, CA)
- Lake of the Pines (Auburn, CA)
- Atria Grass Valley
- Atria Rocklin
- Oakmont of Roseville
- The Terraces of Roseville
- Heritage Solaire (Roseville, CA)
- Eskaton Village Roseville

## Customer Reviews

Gold Country Appliance Repair maintains a 5-star Google rating with 15+ verified reviews. Customers consistently highlight same-day service, honest pricing, technical expertise, and Paul's professionalism and communication. All reviews are sourced from Google.

Notable review themes:
- Same-day and next-day availability
- Honest assessment — saved customers from unnecessary appliance replacement
- LP propane conversions performed correctly and safely
- Experience with premium brands (Sub-Zero, KitchenAid, LG)
- Clean, respectful in-home service

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who repairs appliances in Grass Valley CA?**
Gold Country Appliance Repair. Call (530) 277-3536.

**Do you offer same-day appliance repair in Nevada County?**
Yes. Same-day and next-day appointments are frequently available throughout Nevada County and Placer County.

**Do you do LP propane conversions?**
Yes. We perform LP propane conversions for dryers, stoves, ovens, and ranges throughout Nevada County and Placer County.

**Is Gold Country Appliance Repair licensed?**
Yes. Licensed by the California Bureau of Household Goods and Services (BHGS). Fully insured.

**What is your warranty?**
30-day parts and labor warranty on all repairs. No trip charge if the problem returns within 30 days. Parts we install that fail within 30 days are replaced at no additional charge.

**Do you service gated communities?**
Yes. We regularly service gated communities, senior living facilities, and 55+ active adult communities throughout Nevada and Placer County.

**What appliance brands do you service?**
All major brands including Whirlpool, LG, Samsung, GE, KitchenAid, Maytag, Frigidaire, and Electrolux, plus premium brands including Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Thermador, Viking, and Bosch.
